rationale: The cited paper is highly conceptually aligned with the citing paper’s core question: both examine self-customization/design freedom and when greater uniqueness can reduce value (cited: luxury customization shows declines at high design freedom; citing: uniqueness can hurt resale value). The citing note explicitly positions itself against the “predominantly positive view” in mass-customization research, and this cited work appears to be a plausible theory/comparison source in that debate rather than a generic mention. Given this strong topical overlap, the pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
